attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks from 25km out on familiar terrain, willing to commit fully to high-risk breakaways rather than waiting for finale sprints.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team setup patterns. Solo effort observed suggests autonomy given to seize opportunistic breaks.
terrain_preference: Local/home roads where course knowledge provides tactical advantage; capable on mixed terrain requiring sustained solo time-trial efforts.
vulnerability: Limited data, but Pro Continental status suggests may lack firepower against coordinated WorldTour chase efforts in neutral territory.
key_patterns: Thrives on home advantage motivation, performing beyond typical level on familiar roads
Commits to extremely long solo efforts (25km), showing strong time-trial capability under pressure
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single race observation available from 2019, insufficient recent data to assess trajectory
